description: A system for users to rent cars. It handles user registration, car booking, and order management.

user_roles.description: Can register, log in, view car tariffs, book cars, and view their rental orders.
Implicitly manages car data and user accounts (though no explicit admin pages are provided in the evidence).

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Allows new users to create an account in the system.
features.outputs: A new user account is created in the 'registerhere' table.
business_rules: Username must be unique (primary key in registerhere).

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allows existing users to log in to the system.
features.outputs: User is authenticated and redirected to the car rental page (rent.php).
business_rules: Credentials must match a registered user in the 'registerhere' table.

features.name: Car Rental Booking
features.description: Enables authenticated users to select a car and book it for a specified period.
features.outputs: A rental request is recorded in the 'request' table.
business_rules: Booking requires start and end dates (doi, dor).
Payment details (cc, dc) and other charges (distance, no, mob, sub) are collected.

features.name: View My Orders
features.description: Allows authenticated users to view their past and current rental requests.
features.outputs: A list of the user's rental requests is displayed.
business_rules: Only authenticated users can view their orders.

features.name: User Logout
features.description: Allows authenticated users to log out of the system.
features.outputs: User session is terminated, and the user is redirected to the login page.

features.name: View Car Tariffs
features.description: Displays available car information and rental rates to users.
features.outputs: A list of cars with their details and pricing.

workflows.name: User Registration Workflow
postconditions: A new user account is created in the 'registerhere' table.
User is likely redirected to a confirmation or login page (not explicitly shown).

workflows.name: User Login Workflow
preconditions: User is not currently logged in.
postconditions: User is redirected to the car rental page (rent.php).

workflows.name: Car Rental Booking Workflow

steps.action: Navigate to the car rental page
Select a car and enter booking details

postconditions: Rental request is saved in the 'request' table.
User is redirected to the car rental page (rent.php).

workflows.name: User Logout Workflow
postconditions: User is redirected to the login page (login.php).
